meta.title: New Air Force Doc 'Dangerous Game' (features AirPower's Alex Hollings)
meta.description:
The US Air Force’s 3d Audio Visual Squadron just released a full-length documentary about a group of American F-15E Strike Eagles and F-16 Fighting Falcons taking on literally hundreds of Iranian kamikaze drones in the Middle East last April... and our own Alex Hollings got to be a part of it. 

Watch "Dangerous Game" now: 
https://youtu.be/ZQ8UUoRCzgs?feature=shared
